agent.input: Can you help me email sarah.smith@personal.com regarding the meeting?

arguments.subject: Meeting Follow-up
arguments.body:
Hi Sarah,

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to follow up regarding our recent meeting and discuss next steps. Please let me know if you have any questions or if there's anything specific you'd like to cover in our next conversation.

Looking forward to your thoughts.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
arguments.email_content:
Hi Sarah,

Looking forward to your thoughts.
